findings.title: Add lifecycle prevent_destroy on Key Vault and SQL Database
findings.description: Key Vault with purge protection and SQL Database with production data should have lifecycle { prevent_destroy = true } to guard against accidental terraform destroy.
findings.recommendation: Add lifecycle meta-argument to Key Vault and SQL Server module calls in the implementation plan.

findings.title: Configure diagnostic settings for all resources
findings.description: The plan creates Log Analytics and App Insights but does not explicitly plan diagnostic settings for Key Vault, SQL, App Service, and SWA to ship logs to Log Analytics.
findings.recommendation: Add a task for diagnostic settings on each resource, or note that AVM modules include diagnostic_settings parameters.

findings.title: Consider network restriction for Key Vault
findings.description: Even in dev, Key Vault network ACLs can restrict access to specific VNets or IPs. Currently the plan has no network restrictions.
findings.recommendation: For dev environment this is acceptable, but flag for production upgrade path.

compact_for_parent: Plan P1 (sec-gov): 0 must-fix, 2 should-fix (lifecycle prevent_destroy, diagnostic settings), 1 suggestion (KV network ACLs). PASS.
